x-enumeration-literals.name: Branch Submission
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim is submitted in person at a bank branch or insurer office.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Online Portal
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim is submitted digitally through the banks or insurers online platform or mobile application.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mail
x-enumeration-literals.description: The claim is submitted by sending required documents via postal mail or email.
